title: Light For The Upright

sections.label: Intro
lines: Oh, the light of the upright shines,
A flame untouched by night,
In the shadow, their hope aligns,
With grace, their steps alight.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Blessed are they who stand in awe,
Who walk the sacred way,
Their hearts are steady, without flaw,
Their love, a boundless ray.
Their homes are filled with joy and peace,
Their children rise in truth,
Their bounty flows, it will not cease,
Renewed as morning’s youth.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: In the darkest hour, they remain,
A beacon in the storm,
With faith unbroken by the strain,
Their lives are gently warmed.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Forever steadfast, they will not fear,
The righteous hearts hold dear.
Through every trial, they will prevail,
Their song of hope will sail.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mercy marks their every deed,
Their hands are always kind,
They scatter light where shadows feed,
Their purpose intertwined.
No evil rumor shakes their soul,
Their hearts are fixed and true,
Their story written on the scroll,
Of all they dared to do.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: They rise as dawn on weary lands,
Their justice never wanes,
The world is touched by their commands,
A love that still remains.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Forever steadfast, they will not fear,
The righteous hearts hold dear.
Through every trial, they will prevail,
Their song of hope will sail.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Oh, the light of the upright shines,
A flame untouched by night,
In the shadow, their hope aligns,
With grace, their steps alight.

epigraph: Unto the upright there ariseth light in the darkness
styleNote: Building A Dreamy Ambiance · Shimmering Guitars Swelling · Dreamlike Synth Pads Enveloping
